title: Legacy Heroes
description: Adds Quirks and Support Items from the series "My Hero Academia"
body:
# Legacy Heroes
### **THIS MOD IS IN BETA WHAT YOU MAY SEE WON'T BE IN THE FINAL RELEACE *PROBABLY***
### **THIS MOD IS ALSO ARCHIVED TILL WE HAVE TIME TO CONTINUE ON IT :shrug:**

Legacy Heroes is a simple and easy mod that gives players natural superpowers called "Quirks" and props from the show [My Hero Academia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/My_Hero_Academia) and is inspired by the mod [Timeless Heroes](https://modrinth.com/mod/superhero) and the mod [Mine Hero RX](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/my-hero-academia)

## Quirks:
- Invisibility
- Hardening
- Zero Gravity
- Healing
- Amphibian (Still in works)
(more in the future)

In survival when you start a world your quirks will randomly manifest (this can be changed with a gamerule to disable it from happening)

Btw Quirks in the mod can be improved with leveling up with XP (Invisible Quirk requires you to be in level 5 to become invisible forever....)

##   Join the Discord Server:
  You can suggest anything for the mod or even see the progress of it
  [right Here](https://discord.gg/PG45nNWssF)!

<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>

/quirk add <player> <quirk> (Choose to add your quirk)

/quirk remove <player> (Choose to remove your quirk!)

</details>
